training_status: physical job with constant lifting 40-60 lbs hundreds of times daily, 20-28k steps per day, 70+ hours 6 days a week; no formal gym workouts
health_conditions: poor rest/sleep due to work schedule

benefits.description: Lost 37 lbs (268 to 231 lbs) from August 12, 2025 to January 13, 2026 (~154 days)
Appetite suppression, no longer binge eating, no longer craving sugar or alcohol
No longer wanting to drink alcohol

protocol_notes: Previously took Tirzepatide alone; now on Retatrutide stacked with small dose Semaglutide for prolonged appetite suppression. Results better than Tirzepatide alone. Started at 268 lbs on August 12, 2025; down to 231 lbs by January 13, 2026.
